name: No-Hassle Wassail
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apple cider, apricot nectar, rum, brown sugar, lemon juice, and cinnamon sticks in a large Dutch oven.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 1 hour.
4. Stuff the oranges with cloves.
5. Add the stuffed oranges to the cider mixture.
6. Serve hot. YIELD: 1-1/2 gallons
